name_en: Still minimalist new bucket bag, featuring imported sheepskin drawstring paired with a signature logo. Large capacity design, combining aesthetics and practicality, very roomy. The smooth and glossy sheepskin surface feels premium. Comes with a detachable pouch inside, adjustable shoulder strap, easily switching between a crossbody or shoulder bag! Satisfies various daily occasions. Full of three-dimensional feel, perfectly interpreting understated and minimalist~
name_cn:
Still minimalist new bucket bag, featuring imported sheepskin drawstring paired with a signature logo. Large capacity design, combining aesthetics and practicality, very roomy. The smooth and glossy sheepskin surface feels premium. Comes with a detachable pouch inside, adjustable shoulder strap, easily switching between a crossbody or shoulder bag! Satisfies various daily occasions. Full of three-dimensional feel, perfectly interpreting understated and minimalist~
Style No.: 804302
Size: 26×30×13cm
